modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about resources at residence hall front desk

full_description_text:  
User wants to know what resources are available.  
This is regarding the front desk at the residence hall.  
Details on specific items or services are unclear.
